name: GitHub Copilot semantic repository indexing
context_primitives: Background semantic index of repository code so Copilot Chat and cloud agents can retrieve meaning-relevant snippets without users naming exact symbols.
deployment_pattern: Automatic when using Copilot Chat with repo context in supported surfaces; initial indexing may take tens of seconds on large repos then faster incremental refresh.
benchmarks_eval_alignment: Improves practical hit-rate on codebase Q&A; not a standalone academic benchmark.
ecosystem_integrations: GitHub.com, VS Code Copilot Chat, Copilot cloud agent; data use governed by GitHub privacy docs (indexed content not used for model training per product documentation).
differentiators: Native cloud index tied to Git hosting vs. purely local grep/embedding pipelines.
significance_for_builders: Treat IDE chat as RAG-over-repo: quality depends on index freshness and query formulation; still combine with explicit @-file references for critical paths.
key_timeline_or_milestones: GitHub Docs 'Indexing repositories for GitHub Copilot' describes behavior and refresh expectations.

primary_sources.title: GitHub Docs — Indexing repositories for GitHub Copilot
